moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Shorter range than crouch LP but +1F extra hitstun meaning move combo potential (naturally combos into things like LP/MP Ryuuenbu (QCB special)

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Decent range with strong hitbox priority and fully cancelable makes this a solid neutral tool

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Core combo and whiff punish tool that leads into Mai's highest damage routes

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Very short range but goes into the LK Target Combo follow-ups | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Good combo / poke / whiff punish tool | Mai lifts up her front leg hurtbox on frames 4-17 making this a good tool against low attacks

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Good whiff punish tool | Causes a crumple-like free juggle state on a grounded Punish Counter (opponent is airborne for any follow-up hits)

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Furthest range of Mai's light buttons (but less combo potential than 5LP due to 1F less hitstun)

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Decent combo / buffer tool | Solid range for a crouch MP

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Mostly a combo tool (like from Drive Rush) but the first hit does have very strong hitbox priority for counter-poking | First hit pulls in the opponent on hit or block

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Your average SF6 crouch MK | Incurs a 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Has good hitbox priority against low attacks (the extended kick hurtbox can effectively low crush some low attacks) | +1F extra recovery frame (23F) on block

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Fast air-to-air option | Best horizontal hitbox priority of Mai's jumping attacks

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Good air-to-air hitboxes

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Good hitbox for vertical air approaches

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Can be used as an instant Overhead

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Furthest horizontal range of Mai's jump-in attacks

moves.name: Senkotsu Uchi
moves.notes: Fast Overhead with decent frame advantage (can meaty on last active frame to get jab combo follow-ups) | Causes a spiked knockdown on airborne opponents

moves.name: Handstand Kick
moves.notes: Legs and lower body (keep in mind Mai is upside down) are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-12 making this a fantastic anti-air | Forced stand on hit (important for some combo routes)

moves.name: Hien Ren Kyaku 1
moves.notes: Forces stand on hit | This 2-hit version can be useful for some combo extensions while the latter hits of Kachousen (fan) are falling down onto the opponent

moves.name: Hien Ren Kyaku 2
moves.notes: Mai leaps off the opponent and can be followed up with a Musasabi no Mai (Divekick) or SA2 before landing (Divekick can be delayed quite a bit for potentially better angle and + frames on Flame Stock version) | Airborne on frames 10-35 (Forced Knockdown state) followed by 4F landing recovery

moves.name: Hoshi Kujaku
moves.notes: Extremely easy to hit confirm (28F window) | Puts opponents into a limited juggle state (juggle follow-ups depend on if the opponent was grounded or airborne like after a Drive Rush juggle extension)

moves.name: Shiranui Gourin
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up for +3 mixup between strike / throw (corner only, cannot walk back to bait throw tech) | Can walk up for a throw loop with 2F timing on Zangief and 1F timing on Blanka/E. Honda

moves.name: Fuusha Kuzushi
moves.notes: Back Throw oki: Can do meaty attacks or Drive Rush into strike / throw (corner only) | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Yume Zakura
moves.notes: Corner Air Throw: Dash up for +2 mixup between strike / throw (corner only) | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Botan Ichige
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Yusura Ume
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: Taunt
moves.notes: Back Taunt is 430F start-up that spawns 8-hit Super projectile hitboxes on both sides of Mai | Projectile hitbox low to the ground that hits for 800 damage total (1500 damage if doing the held version) but is also hugely punishable even on hit

moves.name: LP Kachousen
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.04

moves.name: LP Kachousen (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit, +100 damage (600 damage total) and cannot be swatted away by the opponents attacks (functions like a regular projectile) | 2-hit projectile

moves.name: MP Kachousen
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.05

moves.name: MP Kachousen (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit, +100 damage (600 damage total) and cannot be swatted away by the opponents attacks (functions like a regular projectile) | 2-hit projectile

moves.name: HP Kachousen
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.07

moves.name: HP Kachousen (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit, +100 damage (600 damage total) and cannot be swatted away by the opponents attacks (functions like a regular projectile) | 2-hit projectile

moves.name: Kachousen (hold)
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | This fan cannot be swatted away by the opponent (behaves like a normal projectile would)

moves.name: Kachousen (stock + hold)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit and +100 damage (600 damage) before the bounce | 2-hit projectile

moves.name: OD Kachousen
moves.notes: 1-hit OD projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.05

moves.name: OD Kachousen (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit, +100 damage (600 damage) before the bounce, and grants +1 frame advantage on block (regular OD version is -3 on block) | 2-hit OD projectile

moves.name: OD Kachousen (hold)
moves.notes: Two separate 1-hit OD projectiles | Projectile Speed: 0.05

moves.name: OD Kachousen (stock + hold)
moves.notes: Enhanced: Both fans bounce upwards after connecting on hit / block and they all naturally combo for +100 extra damage (700 damage total) | Two separate 1-hit OD projectiles

moves.name: Midare Kachousen
moves.notes: Two separate 1-hit OD projectiles (Four separate OD projectiles in total if you factor in the prior OD Kachousen) | Projectile Speed: 0.072

moves.name: Midare Kachousen (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: Deals +200 extra damage on a regular hit (1400 damage total) with both the initial OD fans as well as the follow-up fans all bounce, resulting in 8 projectiles total (4 hitting directly, and 4 bouncing) which gives Mai huge frame advantage on block | Two separate 1-hit OD projectiles (Four separate OD projectiles in total if you factor in the prior OD Kachousen)

moves.name: LK Hishou Ryuuenjin
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-14 | Airborne on frames 7-37 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: LK Hishou Ryuuenjin (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit and 100 extra damage (1000 damage total) as well as slightly higher KDA (KD +31 instead of +29) | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-14

moves.name: MK Hishou Ryuuenjin
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-10 | Airborne on frames 8-37 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: MK Hishou Ryuuenjin (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit and 100 extra damage (1200 damage total) as well as slightly higher KDA (KD +32 instead of +31) | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-10

moves.name: HK Hishou Ryuuenjin
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11 | Airborne on frames 9-38 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HK Hishou Ryuuenjin (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit and 100 extra damage (1300 damage total) as well as slightly higher KDA (KD +32 instead of +31) | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11

moves.name: OD Hishou Ryuuenjin
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8 and further invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-10 | Airborne on frames 8-41 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Hishou Ryuuenjin (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: 1 extra hit and 100 extra damage (1700 damage total) as well as better oki (KD +27 instead of +20) | Fully invincible on frames 1-8 and further invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-10

moves.name: LP Ryuuenbu
moves.notes: Strike hitbox that also can also nullify 1 hit of a non-OD projectile | This LP version doesn't knockdown on normal hit like the other versions, instead gives good frame advantage on hit (+3) to maintain pressure

moves.name: LP Ryuuenbu (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (900 damage total), safe on block (-2 instead of -4), and knocks down on normal hit (Knockdown doesn't require Counter-Hit or Punish Counter) | Strike hitbox that also can also nullify 1 hit of a non-OD projectile

moves.name: MP Ryuuenbu
moves.notes: Strike hitbox that also can also nullify 1 hit of a non-OD projectile on the second hit | Can be spaced out to be relatively safe on block

moves.name: MP Ryuuenbu (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (1100 damage total) and better oki (KD +42 instead of KD +35) | Strike hitbox that also can also nullify 1 hit of a non-OD projectile on the second hit

moves.name: HP Ryuuenbu
moves.notes: Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 6-17 (situational but slow anti-air option) | Strike hitbox that also can also nullify 1 hit of a non-OD projectile on the second hit

moves.name: HP Ryuuenbu (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (900 damage total), no additional damage scaling, and better juggles / oki (KD +47 instead of KD +43) | Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 6-17 (situational but slow anti-air option)

moves.name: OD Ryuuenbu
moves.notes: Strike hitbox that can also nullify 1 hit of OD projectile on the second and third hit | Last hit launches the opponent up high for juggle follow-ups (free juggle state if only the last hit connected)

moves.name: OD Ryuuenbu (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (1100 damage total) and better juggle routes (Juggle Increase +1 instead of +2) | Strike hitbox that can also nullify 1 hit of OD projectile on the second and third hit

moves.name: LK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state (sets up for juggle follow-ups in various airborne juggle scenarios)

moves.name: LK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 extra damage on the second hit (900 damage total) | Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry

moves.name: MK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state (sets up for juggle follow-ups in various airborne juggle scenarios)

moves.name: MK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 extra damage on second hit (1000 damage total) | Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry

moves.name: HK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state (sets up for juggle follow-ups in various airborne juggle scenarios)

moves.name: HK Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 extra damage on second hit (1100 damage total) | Core combo tool with fantastic corner carry

moves.name: OD Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: Can be followed-up with airborne normals / specials on frames 54-74 (air follow-ups are not possible on block) | Mai does not leap into the air if the initial cartweel is blocked

moves.name: OD Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 extra damage on second hit (900 damage total) | Can be followed-up with airborne normals / specials on frames 54-74 (air follow-ups are not possible on block)

moves.name: Musasabi no Mai
moves.notes: Can only be performed during a forward jump | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: Musasabi no Mai (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (1100 damage total) and slightly better frame advantage on hit / block | Can only be performed during a forward jump

moves.name: OD Musasabi no Mai
moves.notes: Can only be performed during a forward jump | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit (more juggle potential than the non-OD version)

moves.name: OD Musasabi no Mai (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +100 damage (1300 damage total), better frame advantage on hit / block, and better juggle potential (even causes OTG ground bounce on airborne hits) | Can only be performed during a forward jump

moves.name: Kagerou no Mai
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-8 | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-39

moves.name: Kagerou no Mai (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +300 damage (2300 total), better oki (KD +40 instead of +28) and increased horizontal range | Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-6 (BUG?: 2F less invincibility than regular version)

moves.name: Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8 | Armor Break

moves.name: Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: Gains Projectile invincibility extension and +200 damage (3000 total), making this a very strong tool against other projectile users | Fully invincible on frames 1-8 and then Projectile invincible on frames 9-12

moves.name: Air Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
moves.notes: No form of invincibility whatsoever | Only 3F start-up when used in air as opposed to the 7F grounded version

moves.name: Air Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (stock)
moves.notes: Enhanced: +200 damage (3000 total) | No form of invincibility whatsoever

moves.name: Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-11 | Armor Break

moves.name: Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura (Critical Art)
